mapper.select: select count(*) from LEARNING_SCHEDULER ls inner join TEMPLATE t on t.ID = ls.TEMPLATE_ID inner join HC_MEMBER hm on ls.REG_ID = hm.MEM_ID

select
, t.TEMPLATE_NAME , hm.MEM_NAME as regNm from LEARNING_SCHEDULER ls inner join TEMPLATE t on t.ID = ls.TEMPLATE_ID inner join HC_MEMBER hm on ls.REG_ID = hm.MEM_ID
ORDER BY ls.REG_DT
ASC
DESC

select
, t.TEMPLATE_NAME from LEARNING_SCHEDULER ls inner join TEMPLATE t on t.ID = ls.TEMPLATE_ID where ls.DEL_AT = 'N' and ls.SCHED_ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into maummcc.LEARNING_SCHEDULER (SCHED_NM, HDQR_BOB_DCD, TERM_TY, ST_YMD, ST_TIME, USE_AT, REG_ID, REG_DT, MOD_ID, MOD_DT, DEL_AT, TEMPLATE_ID, DES) values (#{schedNm}, #{hdqrBobDcd}, #{termTy}, #{stYmd}, #{stTime}, #{useAt}, #{regId}, current_timestamp(), #{modId}, current_timestamp(), 'N', #{templateId}, #{des});
mapper.update: update maummcc.LEARNING_SCHEDULER set SCHED_NM = #{schedNm}, HDQR_BOB_DCD = #{hdqrBobDcd}, TERM_TY = #{termTy}, ST_YMD = #{stYmd}, ST_TIME = #{stTime}, USE_AT = #{useAt}, MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = current_timestamp(), TEMPLATE_ID = #{templateId}, DES = #{des} where SCHED_ID = #{schedId};
update maummcc.LEARNING_SCHEDULER set DEL_AT = 'Y', MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = current_timestamp(), where SCHED_ID = #{schedId};
mapper.sql: ls . SCHED_ID , ls.SCHED_NM , ls.HDQR_BOB_DCD , ls.USE_AT , ls.MOD_DT , ls.REG_ID , ls.REG_DT , ls.TEMPLATE_ID , ls.TERM_TY , ls.ST_YMD , ls.ST_TIME , ls.USE_AT , ls.TERM_TY , ls.ST_YMD , ls.ST_TIME , ls.USE_AT , ls.DES

where ls.DEL_AT = 'N'
AND (ls.SCHED_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR t.TEMPLATE_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR hm.MEM_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
mapper.select:
select count(*) from LEARNING_SCHEDULER ls where ls.TEMPLATE_ID in
#{item}
mapper.update:
update LEARNING_SCHEDULER ls set ls.DEL_AT = 'Y', ls.MOD_ID = #{memId}, ls.MOD_DT = current_timestamp() where ls.SCHED_ID in
#{item}
mapper.select: SELECT ls.SCHED_ID FROM LEARNING_SCHEDULER ls INNER JOIN TEMPLATE t ON t.ID = ls.TEMPLATE_ID WHERE ls.DEL_AT = 'N' AND ls.USE_AT = 'Y' AND ls.ST_YMD >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d') AND ls.ST_TIME = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%H:%i')
